label: the number one
association: 1 is for one rooster crowing at dawn to wake the whole farm!

label: the number two
association: 2 is for two goats butting heads in the sunny pasture!

label: the number three
association: 3 is for three chicks hatching from their warm eggs!

label: the number four
association: 4 is for four rows of corn planted in the garden!

label: the number five
association: 5 is for five eggs resting snug in the nest!

label: the number six
association: 6 is for six jars of jam lined up on the pantry shelf!

label: the number seven
association: 7 is for seven apple trees standing tall in the orchard!

label: the number eight
association: 8 is for eight honeybees buzzing around the hive!

label: the number nine
association: 9 is for nine ears of corn drying in the barn!

label: the number ten
association: 10 is for ten strawberries ripe and red on the vine!
